summary: Added a SQLite store (internal/store) plus sync/search/sql commands and --data-source local wiring so the live-query GraphQL CLI has an offline spine.
reason: StackAdapt is a single GraphQL endpoint with no syncable REST resources, so the generator emitted no store/sync/search/sql layer (Priority 0). Without it, verify's data-pipeline gate failed and the brief's promised local-store analysis was missing.
validated_outcome: Live sync pulled 427 real objects; verify data_pipeline PASS (resources has 427 rows); sql/search/--data-source local all return real data.
